title: Kiradu temples
tagline: Kiradu temples — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: The Kiradu temples are a group of ruined Hindu temples located in the Barmer district of Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: The Kiradu temples are a group of ruined Hindu temples located in the Barmer district of Rajasthan, India. Kiradu town is located in the Thar Desert, about 35 km from Barmer and 157 km from Jaisalmer. The ruins of at least five temples exist at Kiradu. Of these, the Someshvara temple, dedicated to Shiva, is the best-preserved structure.

topPlaces.name: Derasar, Rajasthan
topPlaces.description: Derasar is a village in the Barmer district of Rajasthan, near the border of India and Pakistan. Derasar lies within the Thar Desert, which influences the lives of the residents; taankas are used to collect water and husbands have two wives, one of whom devotes herself to collecting water from a nearby water source five kilometres away from the village.

items.note: Derasar is a village in the Barmer district of Rajasthan, near the border of India and Pakistan. Derasar lies within the Thar Desert, which influences the lives of the residents; taankas are used to collect water and husbands have two wives, one of whom devotes herself to collecting water from a nearby water source five kilometres away from the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kiradu temples?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kiradu temples is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kiradu temples?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jodhpur Airport (203 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaisalmer Railway Station (131 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kiradu temples?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kiradu temples at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kiradu temples?
faq.a: Stays in Kiradu temples start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kiradu temples?
faq.a: The top attractions are Derasar, Rajasthan.
